title: "display problem..."
date: 2007-12-22

### Post by adramalech on 2007-12-22
i dont know what is wrong with my desktop....i booted into it last night at 1280x1024 rez and when i booted in this morning it was 800x600 at 50 refreash and i cant seem to get out of it even when i try to force the resolution it still wont do it....i am using kernel 2.6.22.xx generic...

here is my xorg.conf file:
